mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_menu ORDER BY COALESCE(parent_id, 0), sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (parent_id, title, path, icon, sort_order, permission_code, menu_type, enabled) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{title}, #{path}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{permissionCode}, #{menuType}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, title = #{title}, path = #{path}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, permission_code = #{permissionCode}, menu_type = #{menuType}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
